description: Viber Music Player Enhancements - UI polish, new features, and better UX

userStories.title: Add keyboard shortcuts for player controls
userStories.description: As a user, I want to control playback with keyboard shortcuts so I can use the player hands-free.
acceptanceCriteria: Space bar toggles play/pause
Arrow Right skips to next track
Arrow Left goes to previous track
Arrow Up increases volume by 10%
Arrow Down decreases volume by 10%
M key toggles mute
Shortcuts only active when not typing in an input field
Typecheck passes with `npx tsc --noEmit`
Lint passes with `npm run lint`
userStories.notes: Keyboard event listener should be in the player page component or a custom hook. Check src/app/player/page.tsx and src/components/YouTubePlayer.tsx for player logic.

userStories.title: Add a now-playing song info card with animated gradient background
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the current song's title, artist, and mood prominently displayed with a visually appealing animated gradient that matches the current mood.
acceptanceCriteria: Song title and channel name displayed prominently above the player controls
Animated gradient background that shifts colors based on current song mood
Smooth transition animation when song changes (fade out old, fade in new)
Responsive layout - works on mobile and desktop
Uses framer-motion for animations (already in dependencies)
Typecheck passes with `npx tsc --noEmit`
Lint passes with `npm run lint`
userStories.notes: Check MoodThemeProvider.tsx for existing mood-to-color mapping. Use framer-motion AnimatePresence for transitions.

userStories.title: Add shuffle and repeat toggle buttons to player controls
userStories.description: As a user, I want to shuffle the remaining playlist or repeat the current song.
acceptanceCriteria: Shuffle button randomizes remaining unplayed songs in the queue
Repeat button cycles through: no repeat → repeat all → repeat one
Visual indicator shows active state (highlighted icon when shuffle/repeat is on)
Repeat one loops the current song when it ends
Uses lucide-react icons (Shuffle, Repeat, Repeat1)
Typecheck passes with `npx tsc --noEmit`
Lint passes with `npm run lint`
userStories.notes: Add to BottomBar.tsx controls. Playlist state is managed in the player page.

userStories.title: Add playlist queue sidebar showing upcoming songs
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the full playlist queue so I know what songs are coming up next.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar or panel shows all songs in the current session playlist
Current playing song is highlighted
Played songs are visually dimmed/marked
Upcoming songs show their mood tag with colored badge
Clicking a song in the queue jumps to that song
Smooth scroll to keep current song visible
Typecheck passes with `npx tsc --noEmit`
Lint passes with `npm run lint`
userStories.notes: Check Sidebar.tsx for existing sidebar. Songs data is in MoodPacks.ts. The player page manages the playlist state.

userStories.title: Add mood transition progress indicator
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a visual indicator of my mood journey - showing where I started and how the playlist is transitioning me toward a happier mood.
acceptanceCriteria: Horizontal progress bar showing mood transition journey
Shows mood labels along the bar (e.g., Sad → Calm → Happy → Energetic)
Current position highlighted based on current song's mood
Smooth animation as mood transitions progress
Tooltips on hover showing mood name
Uses the mood color scheme from MoodThemeProvider
Typecheck passes with `npx tsc --noEmit`
Lint passes with `npm run lint`
userStories.notes: Reference the mood transition paths from README.md. Create as a new component in src/components/player_ui/.

userStories.title: Add session summary screen when playlist ends
userStories.description: As a user, when my playlist finishes, I want to see a summary of my mood journey with stats.
acceptanceCriteria: Summary screen appears when last song in playlist finishes
Shows: starting mood, ending mood, total songs played, total listening time
Shows mood journey visualization (reuse mood transition component)
Button to start a new session (returns to mood selector)
Button to replay the same session
Animated entrance using framer-motion
Typecheck passes with `npx tsc --noEmit`
Lint passes with `npm run lint`
userStories.notes: Check SessionStats.tsx for existing stats component. Player state in src/app/player/page.tsx.
